channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Neville close 36-46 Main intercom door unsecured, 29th April
item.description:
Main enterance door unsecured please fixed it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wilmot Close, Peckham, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Pavement, 28th April
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 71. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Rubbish Dumped in Front of Electric Sub-Sttation, 28th April
item.description:
More rubbish has been left dumped in front of the electric sub-station. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bags of Rubbish and Mattress Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
Multiple bags of (possibly commercial) rubbish along with an unwanted mattress have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
An amount of unwanted timber has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture and Bedding Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
Items of unwanted furniture and bedding has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Toilet Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
An unwanted toilet along with a bag of rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Pavement, 28th April
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dried dog waste, 28th April
item.description:
Has been on the pavement for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Bournemouth Road, Peckham, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping hot spot, 28th April
item.description:
Every week there's fly tipping on this corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Laleham Road, Hither Green, Catford, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road drain completely blocked, 28th April
item.description:
Road drain completely blocked with debris including what looks like tarmac (tarmac from the road to the roadway immediately surrounding the drain?)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Westmoreland Road, Plaistow, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road uneven, 28th April
item.description:
Road is uneven and causing damage to tyres.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groombridge Close, Blackfen, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter across all of Palace Road, 28th April
item.description:
From the start of Palace Road to the end there is litter, mainly on the road by the pavement. Because cars are always parked here, I'd guess that's why the litter doesn't get picked up. As well as picking up the litter (thank you), it would be great to consider a bin on the corner of Palace Road where it meets Anerley Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-30, Palace Road, Crystal Palace, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on pavement where sign says not to, 28th April
item.description:
Car is on the pavement where our shouldn't be

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Anerley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Belisha beacon out, 28th April
item.description:
No power to central reservation Belisha beacon
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Street, Lower Belvedere, Bexleyheath, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver birch needs pruning, 28th April
item.description:
A silver birch on the close to the kerb between 11/13 Pickhurst Park requires a sensible prune The only person able to walk passed without being smacked in the face would have the height of a hobbit - This is not fair on the older generation, or the less abled This is not the responsibility of the home owners - it’s not on either of their boundary. The residents of Bromley pay their council tax for local services, including maintenance and the residents of Pickhurst Park should at least expect that our council tax contributes to the maintenance of the street. Non-existent BC, non existent.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsightly property sprawling into the public path., 28th April
item.description:
That property is in such a derelict state that their front drive weeds and Ivy is sprawling over the public footpath. How have you not issued the owners with a section 215? Or better still, send the authorities round to check whether there’s a corpse in there - it’s grim.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Animal Fox, 28th April
item.description:
A Dead Animal Fox At The Back Of St Andrews Church.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Poverest, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council Collection Late, 28th April
item.description:
The council were due to pick this up today but didn’t and since it’s been there more people have added to it, so please collect Thursday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Caravan, 28th April
item.description:
Old Caravan Left On The Highway Causing Obstruction. Please Remove As Soon As Possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, High Street, Poverest, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet
